modules.summary: Provides the authentication form for users to enter Username and Password, with options for guest access and cookie information, and displays inline errors for invalid credentials.
modules.where_it_fits: Serves as the primary entry point to the application for unauthenticated users before accessing the Top Navigation (Home, Dashboard, My Courses); successful authentication redirects users to the Dashboard and then allows access to course-level views and the Course Index sidebar.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is unauthenticated and at the login page (no active session).

modules.summary: The Dashboard presents a personalized overview containing a Timeline of upcoming activities and deadlines and a Calendar with month navigation and course filtering.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation bar via the Dashboard link, this module is the user's landing/overview page that aggregates information across My Courses and links into course-level views (e.g., Course Page and full calendar). It sits early in the user session lifecycle as the central hub users consult after signing in.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is logged in (authenticated); user has at least one enrolled course or a valid personal calendar.

modules.summary: Displays all courses a student is enrolled in as visual cards with filtering, searching, sorting, and per-course actions like starring or hiding.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation bar via the My Courses link, this page is the student's central catalog of enrolled courses and acts as the entry point to individual Course Pages (which show the course tab bar and breadcrumb navigation). It sits alongside Dashboard and Home as a primary navigation destination for accessing course content.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated as a student with viewable course enrollments

modules.summary: Displays a course's content organized into collapsible sections with listed activities and resources under each section.
modules.where_it_fits: This module is the main course view reached from the top navigation (My Courses, Dashboard, or Home) and sits below the course title where the horizontal tab bar (Course, Participants, Grades, Activities, Competencies) and Course Index sidebar appear; it is the central place users use to browse course sections and activities during normal course navigation.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is logged in and enrolled in the selected course; course exists and contains sections/activities.

modules.summary: Displays all users enrolled in the course with filtering and alphabetical tools, showing name (linking to profiles), roles, groups, and last access information.
modules.where_it_fits: Located under the course-level horizontal tab bar (Course → Participants) when viewing a course, alongside Course, Grades, Activities, and Competencies; it is the course-scoped view for inspecting enrolled users and their activity/role information.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is logged in and viewing a specific course page that has enrolled users, with permission to view the course participants.

modules.summary: Displays the student's personal grade report for the current course, showing grade items, calculated weights, earned values, percentages, feedback, and the course total aggregation.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the course-level horizontal tab bar (Course > Grades) when viewing a course; it is a course-scoped view tied to the user's enrollment and complements other course tabs like Participants and Activities. The Grades page is reached while navigated to a specific course from the top navigation (Home/Dashboard/My Courses) or the Course Index sidebar.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Logged in as a student and viewing a specific course where the student is enrolled

modules.summary: Displays an individual course assignment's open/due dates, full description, submission form options, submission and grading status, and any teacher feedback.
modules.where_it_fits: This is an activity-level page within a course, reached from the Course Page (via the Course tab or the Course Index sidebar) or via breadcrumbs when viewing an activity. It surfaces assignment-specific submission and grading information and ties into the course's Activities and Grades areas.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Logged-in user enrolled in the course and viewing the specific assignment activity that is visible to them.

modules.summary: Provides a consolidated, grouped overview of every course activity with collapsible sections and direct links to each activity page.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from a course's horizontal tab bar under the Activities tab and complements the Course Page and Course Index sidebar by offering an alternative, grouped listing of activities; it appears in the course-level navigation path shown in the breadcrumbs when viewing activities.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is logged in and actively viewing a specific course (on the Course Page)

modules.summary: Displays the user's profile information including contact and privacy details, course links, activity and report summaries, and an editable profile form with collapsible panels for personal data and picture.
modules.where_it_fits: Reached from the top navigation user menu (User menu → Profile) alongside Grades, Calendar, Private Files and Preferences; it is part of the account area that complements Dashboard/My Courses and course-level views by surfacing personal settings and links to enrolled course profiles and reports.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Active authenticated session (logged in as the user whose profile is being viewed)

modules.summary: Terminates the current authenticated session and returns the user to the login page.
modules.where_it_fits: Located in the user menu on the right side of the persistent top navigation bar (accessible from Home, Dashboard, My Courses and course pages), this module is available globally and is used at the end of a user session to end access to protected areas and redirect to the login page.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is currently authenticated (active session) and has access to the top navigation user menu.
